title: Brief + derivative dataset #2
context: Following the pilot, the project scales to additional indicators that have passed triage (triage-010). The second brief and derivative dataset demonstrates that the pipeline template is repeatable and generalizes beyond the pilot indicator. Each brief/dataset pair must pass all three independent review gates (domain expert, editorial, licence) and be delivered to a named beneficiary.
objective: Produce and deliver the second derivative dataset and plain-language brief for a FAOSTAT indicator that has passed triage, following the established pipeline and passing all three review gates.
acceptanceCriteria: Source indicator has a committed gate-004 PASS artifact from triage-010; gate was applied prior to any dataset or brief work.

Derivative dataset built by the deterministic harness: tidy long-format CSV, datapackage.json (Frictionless), and Croissant ML metadata; status flags decoded; uncertainty preserved; source totals reconciled; output checksum committed and re-derived in CI.

Plain-language brief passes the statistical-integrity checklist (every figure resolves to a dataset row), passes the non-alarmist editorial review (style-guide checklist artifact committed, zero unresolved flags), includes indicator definition, reference period, uncertainty, 'what the data does not say', 'not advice' notice, and FAO attribution + non-endorsement disclaimer.
All three gate sign-offs committed: domain-expert, editorial, and licence/provenance.
Delivered/used by a named beneficiary with acceptance-evidence artifact (outcomes/<topic-id>.json) recorded; verifiedNeed flips to true only once a named partner confirms use.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; commit is DCO signed-off.
output: A committed derivative dataset (CSV + datapackage.json + Croissant metadata) and plain-language brief #2, with all review artifacts and acceptance-evidence artifact recorded.
